emails.subject: Enron Australia Masters
emails.body: Tana, I work with Jana Morse and our group is in charge of Australia. We have copies of Aussie ISDAs, which ones do you need?? And, what other additional info is required?? Thanks, Janie Forwarded by Juana Fayett/Corp/Enron on 10/19/2000 10:24 AM (Embedded image moved to file: From: Anthony Campos ECT pic11478.pcx) 10/19/2000 10:15 AM

emails.subject: Enron Australia Masters
emails.body: Tana, I work with Jana Morse and our group is in charge of Australia. We have copies of Aussie ISDAs, which ones do you need?? And, what other additional info is required?? emails.subject: Re: Enron Australia Masters
emails.body: Re: Enron Australia Masters The critical documents are usually the masters and any guarantees issued. Thanks for your help. Juana.Fayett@enron.com 10/19/2000 10:32 AM
